subject: WarpTools ts_template_match on multiple GPUs
body:
Hi all,

When I try to use multiple GPUs (or processes per GPU) to run a template 
matching on tomogram, I get only one worker (and one process). This is the 
command I tried:

WarpTools ts_template_match \
--settings warp_tiltseries.settings \
--tomo_angpix 10 \
--subdivisions 5 \
--template_path templates/postprocess.mrc \
--template_angpix 3.09 \
--template_diameter 900 \
--peak_distance 100 \
--npeaks 5000 \
--symmetry C1 \
--whiten \
--subvolume_size 192 \
--perdevice 1

However, only GPU 0 is active.  The memory consumption is the same as with 
--perdevice 1 and I can see only one process running. 

Does WarpTools ts_template_match support multiple GPUs? I have a high 
sub-divisions parameter, as I have a long filament segment, and trying to 
make the segments meet accurately for visualization. 

Cheers,
Juha
